channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: McNeeley scores 17 points as No. 25 UConn rallies to a 76-72 win over No. 15 Baylor
item.description: Liam McNeeley scored 17 points and No. 25 UConn came back from an early deficit to beat No. 15 Baylor 76-72 in the Big 12-Big East Battle.
item.dc:creator: Jim Fuller, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Michigan flipped QB Bryce Underwood with some help from Oracle founder Larry Ellison and Tom Brady
item.description: BELLEVILLE, Mich. (AP) — Bryce Underwood, encircled by a slew of reporters and cameras, was relieved to make his commitment to Michigan official with his signature as college football signing day kicked off on Wednesday. “It's time for the next level,” Underwood said.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NFL upholds Texans' Azeez Al-Shaair's suspension over illegal hit on Trevor Lawrence after appeal
item.description: The NFL upheld the suspension on Houston Texans linebacker Azeez Al-Shaair for an illegal hit on Jacksonville Jaguars quarterback Trevor Lawrence following his appeal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: League upholds 3-game suspension for Houston LB Azeez Al-Shaair following hit on Trevor Lawrence
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The NFL and the NFL players association upheld Houston linebacker Azeez Al-Shaair's three-game suspension without pay for repeated violations of player safety rules following his violent hit to the head of Jacksonville’s Trevor Lawrence, who sustained a concussion and is now on injur
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 76ers coach Nick Nurse says no plans to shut down oft-injured center Joel Embiid
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Joel Embiid's endless injury updates read like this for the week — he sat out Wednesday night against Orlando, there's a chance he could play Friday against the Magic and, no, the 76ers haven't yet considered shutting own the All-Star center.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Steer clear of manufacturing drama in professional sports
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- Rob Manfred has a turbulent run as MLB commissioner. I, admittedly, am not his biggest fan but I give him credit where it is due. The pitch clock has helped the pace of play. Ghost runner in extra innings.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Kirk Herbstreit shares personal letter from President Biden after loss of beloved dog Ben
item.description: ESPN college football analyst Kirk Herbstreit shared a letter he received from President Joe Biden expressing his condolences after the death of Herbstreit's beloved dog Ben.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Commanders' Austin Ekeler says he suffered memory loss after second concussion this season
item.description: Washington Commanders running back Austin Ekeler was placed on injured reserve this past weekend after he sustained his second concussion in a span of just two months.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Matthews scores first goal since return from injury, Maple Leafs beat Blackhawks 4-1
item.description: Auston Matthews scored his first goal since returning from injury as the Toronto Maple Leafs defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 4-1 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Vikings win 5th straight, rallying past Cardinals 23-22 on Sam Darnold's TD pass with 1:13 left
item.description: Sam Darnold's second touchdown pass of the second half went to Jones for Minnesota's first lead with 1:13 remaining, and the Vikings rallied from 13 points down to beat the Arizona Cardinals 23-22 on Sunday for their fifth straight victory.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Alabama A&M player Medrick Burnett Jr. dies following injury during game
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (WIAT) — Medrick Burnett Jr., a 20-year-old football player for Alabama A&M University, died Wednesday a month after sustaining a serious injury during a football game. Burnett Jr., a linebacker who was injured during the Magic City Classic on Oct.
item.dc:creator: Drew Taylor, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers QB Brock Purdy remains severely limited by injury to his throwing shoulder
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Brock Purdy threw one short pass in the open portion of practice for the San Francisco 49ers as he remains slowed by an injury to his throwing shoulder that has already forced him to miss a game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4
